forbidden_scope: hosted browser, provider marketplace, credential vault, full desktop console

integration_evidence.summary: Documents Harbor Runtime technical defaults, module/storage/ref/viewer boundaries, smoke minimums, research absorption and deferred scope for #70-#79.
Links ADR 0008 and defines the required read order for later provider/session/evidence/viewer skeletons.
Records stack, dependency, smoke-test, change-scope and safety constraints for future Harbor runtime work.
Binds the docs-only implementation to GH-71 and states coverage of #70 and #75 without closing issues.
